name: ♡Love Competition《3 Way Love》♤
description: Jayson Lott,Yuri Smith,and Kai Raymond are best friends who find themselves competing for your love.Who will you choose?(Kai is the one with the pink lollipop,Yuri is the one with the yellow lollipop,and Jayson is the one with a lollipop in his mouth.)
creator: Killiana._0
